nasb.text: They shall say to the elders of his city, ‘This son of ours is stubborn and rebellious, he will not obey us, he is a glutton and a drunkard.’

esv.text: and they shall say to the elders of his city, ‘This our son is stubborn and rebellious; he will not obey our voice; he is a glutton and a drunkard.’

cnv.text: 對本城的長老說：‘我們這個兒子忤逆倔強，不聽從我們的話，是個貪食好酒的人。’

ccb.text: ‘我们这个儿子冥顽不灵、悖逆成性，不肯听从我们，是个贪吃好酒之徒。’
